executive-assistant.description: PRESSCO21 company assistant playbook for meetings, action tracking, and cross-team handoffs.

meeting-brief.purpose: Turn scattered notes into a meeting brief with decisions, agenda, owners, and follow-up questions.

weekly-action-tracker.purpose: Build a weekly owner-by-owner action tracker for OpenClaw pilot operations.

handoff-brief.purpose: Rewrite executive notes into a clean handoff brief for another department or specialist agent.

detail-page-planner.description: PRESSCO21 detail-page planning playbook for designers and merchandisers.

detail-page-brief.purpose: Turn product context into a sectioned detail-page brief with copy points and missing asset checks.

video-content-planner.description: PRESSCO21 video planning playbook for shoot planning and channel rollout.

video-plan.purpose: Build a multi-week video plan with reuse candidates, platform notes, and approval checks.

cs-triage-specialist.description: PRESSCO21 customer-support triage playbook for first-pass categorization and reply drafts.

cs-triage.purpose: Classify inbound customer questions, draft a safe first reply, and mark escalation needs.

operations-analyst.description: PRESSCO21 operations digest playbook for recurring issues, bottlenecks, and next actions.

operations-digest.purpose: Summarize weekly operational signals into a digest with bottlenecks and next actions.

knowledge-curator.description: PRESSCO21 knowledge curation playbook for FAQ, SOP, and document update candidates.

knowledge-update.purpose: Turn confirmed decisions and repeated questions into FAQ, SOP, and document update candidates.

crm-account-manager.description: PRESSCO21 CRM account playbook for B2B customer briefs, follow-up, and reactivation planning.

customer-brief.purpose: Turn CRM and relationship notes into a customer brief with risks, opportunities, and next actions.

pricing-margin-analyst.description: PRESSCO21 pricing and margin playbook for SKU-level pricing review and channel strategy.

price-margin-review.purpose: Review current cost, price, and channel margin to suggest safe pricing options.

marketplace-ops-specialist.description: PRESSCO21 marketplace operations playbook for listing prep across MakeShop and open marketplaces.

listing-ops-brief.purpose: Prepare a marketplace listing brief with channel titles, asset gaps, and registration checklist.

bank-ops-assistant.description: PRESSCO21 bank operations playbook for deposit matching and safe follow-up review.

deposit-review.purpose: Review a bank event, estimate likely CRM matching status, and prepare safe follow-up actions.

session-start.instruction:
[pressco21|company-admin|session-start]
project={{projectName}} session={{sessionId}} tmux={{tmuxSession}}
브랜드 기준: 진심, 전문, 즐거운
회사 맥락: B2B 강사/공방 비중이 높고 최종 결정은 사람이 합니다.
역할: 이번 세션의 목표, 리스크, 승인 경계를 4줄 이내로 정리하세요.
참조 우선순위: company-core -> company-profile -> 정책 -> SOP
출력:
- 목표:
- 리스크:
- 승인 필요:
- 첫 행동:

session-idle.instruction:
[pressco21|company-coach|session-idle]
session={{sessionId}} tmux={{tmuxSession}}
역할: 작업이 멈춘 이유를 추정하고, 다음 행동 2개만 제안하세요.
가능하면 브랜드, 상품, 채널, CS 문맥을 company-core 기준으로 보강하세요.
출력:
- 막힌 지점:
- 필요한 입력:
- 다음 행동:

ask-user-question.instruction:
[pressco21|company-coach|ask-user-question]
session={{sessionId}} question={{question}}
역할: 사용자 질문을 더 짧고 분명하게 다듬고, B2B/B2C 맥락과 승인 필요 여부를 고려해 왜 필요한지 설명하세요.
출력:
- 질문:
- 왜 필요한가:
- 답변 오면 할 일:

stop.instruction:
[pressco21|company-admin|stop]
session={{sessionId}} tmux={{tmuxSession}}
역할: 중단 이유와 남은 일, 재개 첫 행동을 3개 항목으로 정리하세요.
출력:
- 중단 이유:
- 남은 일:
- 재개 첫 행동:

session-end.instruction:
[pressco21|company-admin|session-end]
project={{projectName}} session={{sessionId}} tmux={{tmuxSession}} reason={{reason}}
역할: 이번 세션의 산출물, 검증 여부, 후속 액션과 문서 갱신 후보를 운영 기록 형태로 정리하세요.
출력:
- 완료:
- 검증:
- 후속 액션:
- 문서 갱신 후보:
